scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist'; const dest='public/ort-wasm'; if(!fs.existsSync(dest)){fs.mkdirSync(dest, {recursive:true});} fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.wasm')||f.endsWith('.mjs')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f), path.join(dest,f)));"
